members.name: Sterling Hirsch
members.title: Advanced Planning Lead / Collective VFO Mgr.
members.bio:
Sterling Hirsch serves as the Advanced Planning Lead for Collective VFO, where he focuses on facilitating the Proactive Planning Process and collaborating with a team of experts to deliver holistic and tailored solutions for high-net-worth individuals, families, and business owners.

With 23 years of senior-level business management experience, Sterling has successfully founded and led five companies from inception to profitability. His solutions-oriented mindset, persistence, and calm management style enable him to turn obstacles into opportunities while driving results.

Sterling brings a deep understanding of the unique challenges faced by CPA firms and has a proven ability to help them integrate the Proactive Planning Process into their practices. This collaboration allows CPAs to deliver enhanced value to their best clients by addressing complex needs and providing strategic guidance.

Specializing in identifying client priorities, uncovering opportunities, and implementing actionable strategies, Sterling guides clients through a seamless and collaborative process to achieve their most important goals.

members.name: Anna-Marie Lovell
members.title: Advanced Planning Lead
members.bio:
Anna-Marie Lovell serves as an Advanced Planning Lead at Collective VFO, where she specializes in guiding clients through proactive wealth strategies centered on tax efficiency, multi-generational planning, and personalized advisory support. She collaborates with families, business owners, and high-net-worth individuals to develop coordinated strategies that reflect

their long-term vision, legacy objectives, and evolving needs.

With a disciplined background rooted in military service and a career marked by client-centered planning, Anna-Marie brings a unique perspective to the Proactive Planning Process. Her

analytical approach and strong commitment to service empower clients to clarify priorities and take strategic action with confidence.

Anna-Marie began her career of service through the U.S. Navy, where she was commissioned as a Surface Warfare Officer. She completed her Naval Science training at UC Berkeley and earned her Bachelor of Science in Biological Sciences with an emphasis in Neurology, Physiology, and Behavior from the University of California, Davis. She served on the USS Curts (FFG-38) and the USS Nimitz (CVN-68), where she developed her leadership and operational skills, including a nuclear power sub-specialty.

Today, Anna-Marie applies that same mission-driven focus to helping clients build and preserve wealth through coordinated planning. She is passionate about supporting clients in defining goals, identifying key opportunities, and implementing solutions that align with their values and long-term aspirations.

members.name: Wyatt Dursteler
members.title: Advanced Planning Lead/Proactive Coordinator
members.bio:
Wyatt serves as the Advanced Planning Lead and Proactive Coordinator at Collective VFO, leveraging over 15 years of entrepreneurial expertise and 25 years of experience as a real estate professional and investor. With a degree in finance and a career dedicated to empowering individuals and families, [Name] combines a deep understanding of financial strategies with a passion for helping clients achieve their most important goals.

In this role, Wyatt is instrumental in guiding clients through the Proactive Planning Process, collaborating with a team of specialists to deliver holistic and customized solutions. Whether advising on real estate investments, developing innovative financial strategies, or facilitating wealth-building opportunities, [Name]'s approach is rooted in integrity, dedication, and a client-first mindset.

As a devoted husband, father, and outdoor enthusiast, [Name] balances professional excellence with a fulfilling family life. His commitment to creating meaningful relationships and delivering tailored strategies ensures clients receive clarity and confidence as they navigate complex financial decisions. [Name] is passionate about helping clients build secure futures and create opportunities that reflect their unique aspirations and values.

members.name: Alan Barber
members.title: Advanced Planning Lead/CPA
members.bio:
Alan C. Barber is the Advanced Planning Lead and CPA at Collective VFO, bringing over 30 years of expertise in accounting and taxation for businesses and individuals alike. A proud graduate of the University of Georgia, Alan combines his extensive professional experience with a commitment to delivering personalized and effective financial strategies tailored to each client’s unique needs.

In 2021, Alan expanded his CPA practice to Western North Carolina by acquiring a local firm, embracing the region where he spent cherished childhood summers exploring the mountains and valleys of Henderson County. This deep connection to the area informs his dedication to serving the community with integrity and care.

Outside of work, Alan and his wife, Penny, are devoted parents to four grown children and keep busy with their two lively dogs. His blend of technical expertise and approachable nature ensures that clients at Collective VFO receive unparalleled support in navigating complex financial decisions with clarity and confidence.

members.name: Ian Welham
members.title: Proactive Facilitator
members.bio:
Ian Welham began his career qualifying in the UK as a Chartered Accountant with Ernst & Young. He then left public practice and became CFO of a Barcelona-based publicly traded company. Subsequently, Ian held CEO and COO positions in Hong Kong, The Netherlands, Belgium, and the US. 

In 2016 he co-founded HaydenRock Solutions working hands-on with CPA firms to help them become 21st-century accountants. 

Following the merger of Elite Resource Team and HaydenRock in 2020, Ian now focuses on building relationships with Elite members and providing them coaching services to help them Maximize Business Potential and become the Most Relevant Advisor to their clients.   

He resides in New Jersey with his wife, Linda. They have twin daughters. He is a devoted Manchester United “football” fan and an avid golfer.

In particular Ian’s areas of expertise within the Member Support Team are Virtual Proactive Coach and Virtual Proactive Facilitator.
